TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-frog_panay

S.FORM: hang izaw kya cacay a wawa za izaw ku nicakepan nuheni tu balaut palaculen niza i tiza i bubu.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩抓到一隻青蛙，放到籃子中。
There was a child, and he caught a frog and put it in a basket.

S.FORM: iza kya balaut i labu cekulen tu nya wacu.
S.TRANSL: 狗往下看著在裡頭的青蛙。
The dog looked down on the frog, which was inside of a cage.

S.FORM: maidih kyai kya wacu a mukan tya balaut.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗可能想吃那隻青蛙吧!
That dog might want to eat that frog.

S.FORM: mabi’ sa tu kya kya wawa a tya wacu.
S.TRANSL: 小孩跟狗在睡覺。
That child and the dog were sleeping.

S.FORM: meya melaw han tu kya balaut mutahkal kya balaut mulaliw.
S.TRANSL: （我們）看到那隻青蛙跑掉了。
(We saw) that frog ran away.

S.FORM: matalaw nima ku lubuan nanay tu kaku a sa kyai kya balucu’ mulaliw kya balaut.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙心想會一直被關就跑走了。
That frog thought that it would be confined and then ran away.

S.FORM: macukat sa tu kya wawa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩醒來了。
That child woke up.

S.FORM: nayi tu aca kya balaut.
S.TRANSL: 原來青蛙不見了。
It turned out that the frog disappeared.

S.FORM: aya nayi tu kya balaut sa kya wawa a tya wacu.
S.TRANSL: 孩子對狗說：「青蛙不見了。」
That child said to the dog that the frog disappeared.

S.FORM: mikilim tu kuheni sa.
S.TRANSL: 他們去找(青蛙)。
They searched for (frog).

S.FORM: tuhtuhen niza ku ku ku kucu niza mituhtuh.
S.TRANSL: 他把鞋子倒過來。
He placed the shoes upside down.

S.FORM: mumuk tu i tiza pabubuan kya wacu mikilim tya balaut.
S.TRANSL: 狗鑽進籠中去找青蛙。
That dog got into the cage to find the frog.

S.FORM: miawawen nya hiya nya wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩呼喊著。
That child yelled.

S.FORM: kina cu kina bulubulut sa tu kya wacu kina cebucebu’ sa tu haluwacuwacu sa tu a maidih a mulaliw.
S.TRANSL: 連狗都想衝出去及跳進水裡。
Even the dog sprang and wanted to plunge into water.

S.FORM: mikilim tu aca kya wawa tya wacu matepa tu niza kya wacu.
S.TRANSL: 小孩要去找狗了, 結果他找到那隻狗。
The child searched for that dog and he found it.

S.FORM: abibi han niza kya wacu ini tu aca kina wacu sa.
S.TRANSL: 他抱著狗, 原來狗在這。
He held the dog, which was here formerly.

S.FORM: mikilim henay kya wacu tya balaut.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗還在找青蛙。
That dog was still looking for the frog.

S.FORM: ya balaut miawaw tu kuheni tahkal tu kuheni mikilim tya balaut.
S.TRANSL: 他們呼喚著, 他們走出去找青蛙。
They yelled and went out to search for frog.

S.FORM: mamelaw tu niza ku E tatekuh.
S.TRANSL: 他看到虎頭蜂。
He saw hornets.

S.FORM: makatengil ku tatekuh tahkal tu tu tu makatengil tu nipiawaw nuheni tya tya pikilim nuheni tya balaut.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂聽到他們出來尋找青蛙的呼喚聲。
Hornets heard sounds made by the child and the dog when they were searching for the frog.

S.FORM: makamelaw kya wacu tya tya hiya tya tatekuh.
S.TRANSL: 狗看到虎頭蜂。
The dog saw hornets.

S.FORM: E sapizawisen ciniza tya tatekuh.
S.TRANSL: 狗想摘蜂窩。
The dog wanted to pluck the beehives.

S.FORM: mehan tu kya hiya kya wawa misusu’ tu buhang.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩被看到把手放到洞中。
It was seen that the child put his hand inside of the hole.

S.FORM: mitahkal sa tu u kalabaw kyai u kalabaw.
S.TRANSL: 出來的可能是田鼠。
What came out might be voles.

S.FORM: izaw kya kalabaw makalat nya kalabaw ku pising nya wawa.
S.TRANSL: 有田鼠而且咬了小孩的臉。
There was a vole, which bit the face of the child.

S.FORM: kya wacu maidih mikalic ni mizawis tya tatekuh.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗想爬上去摘虎頭蜂蜂窩。
That dog wanted to climbed up and pluck the beehives.

S.FORM: sabeleng sa tu kya tatekuh na mizawis kya wa wacu.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗摘蜂窩, 一群蜜蜂飛過來。
That dog wanted to pluck the beehives and there came a swarm of hornets.

S.FORM: iza kya E u hiya u edu mutahkal.
S.TRANSL: 一隻老鼠跑出來。
There came out a mouse.

S.FORM: E ya han kya wawa mukilim tya edu.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩找老鼠。
That child searched for the mouse.

S.FORM: tatuay sa han melaw han sa ini i sasa kya edu.
S.TRANSL: 他以為(老鼠)去哪裡，結果老鼠在下面。
He wondered where the mouse was, and it was under there.

S.FORM: mikalic kya wawa a tya mimelaw tya buhang nya kilang.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬上樹要看樹洞。
That child climbed up to see the tree hole.

S.FORM: mapulin tu aca melaw han sa izaw ku ayam i labu nya buhang nya ayam.
S.TRANSL: 跌倒之後看到樹洞裡有鳥。
(He) fell down and saw birds in the tree hole.

S.FORM: i u yu tahkal sa kya ayam i tiza i i buhang nya kilang.
S.TRANSL: 小鳥從樹洞出來。
A bird came out of the tree hole.

S.FORM: melaw han u deku’ u deku’.
S.TRANSL: (他們)看到貓頭鷹。
(They) see owls.

S.FORM: kina wacu mulaliw lalaba’en nu tatekuh.
S.TRANSL: 狗跑去追虎頭蜂。
That dog ran away and was chased by hornets.

S.FORM: makamelaw kya ayam tya wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那隻鳥能看得到那個孩子。
The bird could see that child.

S.FORM: sapikalatan kya ayam tya wawa u sapikalatan kina deku’ nahiya tina wawa.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹咬那孩子。
The owl wanted to bite the child.

S.FORM: mikilim kya kya wawa tu wacu.
S.TRANSL: 那孩子在找那隻狗。
The child searched for the dog.

S.FORM: mikilim kya wawa tya wacu.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩在找那隻狗。
The child searched for that dog.

S.FORM: milimek matalaw tya tatekuh.
S.TRANSL: (那隻狗)躲起來因為害怕虎頭蜂。
(That dog) hided due to fear of hornets.

S.FORM: E mamelaw nina wawa ku ngabul.
S.TRANSL: 這小孩看到鹿。
The child saw the deer.

S.FORM: ma u ngabul mikacaw i tiza i i i tangah nya ngabul kya wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那孩子爬到鹿頭上。
The child climbed onto the head of the deer.

S.FORM: sipipacekisan kyai nya ngabul kya wawa mahtik i tiza i tapatapadan kina wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那孩子可能是被鹿撞到，掉到懸崖下。
That child probably was hit by deer and fell off the cliff.

S.FORM: mahtik ciniza i tapad melaw han sa u nanum kya kahtikan niza.
S.TRANSL: 他掉下懸崖而掉下去的地方是水裡。
He fell off the cliff and fell into water.

S.FORM: haluwacu na mahtik i tiza i hiya i nanum kya kya ya wawa a tya wacu.
S.TRANSL: 連小孩跟狗都掉到水中
Even the child and dog fell into water.

S.FORM: misusu’ ciniza mimelaw ciniza i labu nya nya tudem.
S.TRANSL: 他伸手進去漂流木裡面。
He put his hand into the driftwood.

S.FORM: mabuhang kina kilang.
S.TRANSL: 樹有洞。
The tree had a hole.

S.FORM: izaw hakay i zaw i labu kyai ku mamamelawen nu mita a canacanan a adupen.
S.TRANSL: 裡面可能有任何一種獵物。
What is inside may be any kind of pray。

S.FORM: akay mikilim ay henay tya balaut.
S.TRANSL: 可能還在找那隻青蛙。
Probably they were still looking for the frog.

S.FORM: a iniw tu aca matepa tu nuheni kina na balaut tu.
S.TRANSL: 他們就在這裡找到了青蛙。
They found frog here.

S.FORM: melaw han sa mutahkal ay kya balaut mikilim kyai tu pi lucu’ han kya balaut.
S.TRANSL: 看那隻青蛙出來有可能在找出生地。
It could be seen that the frog came out and were looking for its birthplace.

S.FORM: yadah sa tu kina balaut u i tiza i nanunanuman yadah tu aca ku pacainul.
S.TRANSL: 在水裡有很多蝌蚪。
There were many tadpoles in water.

S.FORM: siwawa kina balaut.
S.TRANSL: 那青蛙有孩子了。
The frog had children.
